raw_title: Amazon unveils a slimmer Fire TV Stick HD, opens Ember Artline TVs for preorder
raw_content: On Wednesday, Amazon announced the launch of its new Fire TV Stick HD and Ember Artline televisions, both now available for preorder.  Following the initial release of the first-generation Fire TV Stick HD two years ago, Amazon has created a new model that is its thinnest streaming device to date, the company says. Launched in […]
